product.name: 11-Piece Resistance Bands Full Set
product.description: Five resistance levels (10–50 lbs). Includes handles, ankle straps, door anchor and carry bag. Natural latex, anti-snap design. Suitable for physio, yoga and strength training.

related.name: Lightweight Breathable Mesh Running Shoes
related.description: Engineered mesh upper for breathability and flexibility. EVA midsole for responsive cushioning. Rubber outsole with multi-directional traction. Available in sizes 4–12.

related.name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle 1L Insulated
related.description: Triple-wall vacuum insulation keeps drinks cold 24 hours, hot 12 hours. BPA-free food-grade stainless steel. Leakproof lid. Fits most cup holders. Dishwasher safe.
